title: Xtra Fluffy Filipino Almond Noodles
description: A solo dinner Filipino dish featuring almond paste and bonito flakes, this paleo friendly meal is both resinous and fluffy.
instructions: Cook the rice flour noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine almond paste, coconut milk, and a pinch of sea salt, then blend until smooth.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the blended almond mixture, stirring constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes or until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the almond sauce.
Sprinkle bonito flakes over the noodles and toss again to combine.
Season with sea salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with chopped scallions.
